statement: In every magma, Equation 2627 (`x = (y * ((z * w) * y)) * u`) implies Equation 3417 (`x * y = z * (z * (y * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0998
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z w) y)) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op z (op z (op y x)))
